case_title: TAYLOR LAUNDRY SYSTEMS VS MURPHY JAY DBA MOTEL ORLEANS

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY JAY DBA MOTEL ORLEANS
